gf_lebensmittel.note: BEST — food GF roles, low noise

output_fields.id: int — StepStone job ID, use as cache key

do_not: keyword Direktor Molkerei Fleisch — returns hospital/bank directors, 90% noise
keyword Head of Operations Lebensmittel — returns pharma/logistics, not food
